title: OpenAI adds two banking CEOs to its board as an IPO looms
summary: The ChatGPT maker has put two banking chiefs on both its nonprofit and for-profit boards: Nubank’s David Vélez and BNY’s Robin Vince. OpenAI is not a public company yet.
